slices.purpose: Update living docs and generated artifacts that move with the implementation.
Run focused and broad validation after implementation slices are complete.

read_next: Run `make context-pack topic=implementation-system` before editing if more file context is needed.
Run `make audit-router files=<csv>` after the first implementation slice.
Keep slices sequential; avoid mixing backend, frontend, generated artifacts, and final validation in one edit pass unless the change is tiny.
